```{r em_diabetes_yes}
                                               if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing"))))
```

```{r combine_em_diabetes}
plot_df_diabetes <- rbind( # prior primary care infection diagnosis
  extract_model_data(model = all_mstate_cox_diabetes_no,
                     events_exposed = events(filter(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate,diabetes == 0, exposed==1,
                                                                           if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing")))),
                     events_un_exposed = events(filter(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate,diabetes == 0,exposed==0,
                                                                           if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing")))),
                     sub_group_level = 1,sub_group_desc="Diabetes: No"),
  # prior primary care antibiotic prescription
   extract_model_data(model = all_mstate_cox_diabetes_yes,
                     events_exposed = events(filter(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate,diabetes == 1, exposed==1,
                                                                           if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing")))),
                     events_un_exposed = events(filter(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate,diabetes == 1,exposed==0,
                                                                           if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing")))),
                     sub_group_level = 2,sub_group_desc="Diabetes: Yes")) |>
  arrange(term_description,sub_group) |>
  mutate(term_description = if_else(duplicated(term_description),NA_character_,term_description)) 

# Plot
forestplot_mstate_HRs(model = plot_df_diabetes,
                      height = 40,width = 32,
                      plot_save_name = "Figure_S11_mstate",
                      h_4 = gpar(col = "black", columns = 1:5, lty = "solid",lwd=2),
                      h_6 = gpar(col = "black", columns = 1:5, lty = "solid",lwd=2),
                      h_8 = gpar(col = "black", columns = 1:5, lty = "solid",lwd=2),
                      h_10 = gpar(col = "black", columns = 1:5, lty = "solid",lwd=2),
                      h_12 = gpar(col = "black", columns = 1:5, lty = "solid",lwd=2),
                      h_14 = gpar(col = "black", columns = 1:5, lty = "solid",lwd=2),
                      h_16 = gpar(col = "black", columns = 1:5, lty = "solid",lwd=2),
                      h_18 = gpar(col = "black", columns = 1:5, lty = "solid",lwd=2),
                      h_20 = gpar(col = "black", columns = 1:5, lty = "solid",lwd=2))
```


### EM infection pathogen 
```{r em_bacterial}
all_mstate_cox_bacterial  <- coxph(as.formula(paste("Surv(Tstart,Tstop,status)","~",
                                                  c(glue_collapse(c(expanded_covariates_infection_history,c("strata(trans)","cluster(setid)")),sep = "+")))),
                                 method = "breslow",
                                 data = filter(collect(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate_expcovs),inf_type_of_match_grp == "bacterial",
                                               if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing"))))

```

```{r em_viral}
all_mstate_cox_viral  <- coxph(as.formula(paste("Surv(Tstart,Tstop,status)","~",
                                                  c(glue_collapse(c(expanded_covariates_infection_history,c("strata(trans)","cluster(setid)")),sep = "+")))),
                                 method = "breslow",
                                 data = filter(collect(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate_expcovs),inf_type_of_match_grp == "viral",
                                               if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing"))))
```

```{r em_fungal}
all_mstate_cox_fungal  <- coxph(as.formula(paste("Surv(Tstart,Tstop,status)","~",
                                                  c(glue_collapse(c(expanded_covariates_infection_history,c("strata(trans)","cluster(setid)")),sep = "+")))),
                                 method = "breslow",
                                 data = filter(collect(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate_expcovs),inf_type_of_match_grp == "fungal",
                                               if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing"))))
```

```{r em_parasitic}
all_mstate_cox_parasitic  <- coxph(as.formula(paste("Surv(Tstart,Tstop,status)","~",
                                                  c(glue_collapse(c(expanded_covariates_infection_history,c("strata(trans)","cluster(setid)")),sep = "+")))),
                                 method = "breslow",
                                 data = filter(collect(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate_expcovs),inf_type_of_match_grp == "parasitic",
                                               if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing"))))
```

```{r combine_em_pathogen}
plot_df_inf_pathogen <- rbind( # inf_pathogen 65_70
  extract_model_data( model = all_mstate_cox_bacterial,
  events_exposed = events(filter(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate,inf_type_of_match_grp == "bacterial",exposed==1,
                                                                           if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),
                                                                                  ~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing")))),
  events_un_exposed = events(filter(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate,inf_type_of_match_grp == "bacterial",exposed==0,
                                                                           if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),
                                                                                  ~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing")))),
                     sub_group_level = 1,sub_group_desc="Bacterial"),
   # inf_pathogen 71_80
  extract_model_data( model = all_mstate_cox_viral,
  events_exposed = events(filter(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate,inf_type_of_match_grp == "viral",exposed==1,
                                                                           if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),
                                                                                  ~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing")))),
  events_un_exposed = events(filter(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate,inf_type_of_match_grp == "viral",exposed==0,
                                                                           if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),
                                                                                  ~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing")))),
                     sub_group_level = 2,sub_group_desc="Viral"),
   # inf_pathogen 81_90
  extract_model_data( model = all_mstate_cox_fungal,
  events_exposed = events(filter(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate,inf_type_of_match_grp == "fungal",exposed==1,
                                                                           if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),
                                                                                  ~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing")))),
  events_un_exposed = events(filter(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate,inf_type_of_match_grp == "fungal",exposed==0,
                                                                           if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),
                                                                                  ~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing")))),
                     sub_group_level = 3,sub_group_desc="Fungal"),
   # inf_pathogen >90
  extract_model_data( model = all_mstate_cox_parasitic,
  events_exposed = events(filter(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate,inf_type_of_match_grp == "parasitic",exposed==1,
                                                                           if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),
                                                                                  ~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing")))),
  events_un_exposed = events(filter(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate,inf_type_of_match_grp == "parasitic",exposed==0,
                                                                           if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),
                                                                                  ~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing")))),
                     sub_group_level = 4,sub_group_desc="Parasitic")) |>
  arrange(term_description,sub_group) |>
  mutate(term_description = if_else(duplicated(term_description),NA_character_,term_description)) 

# Plot
forestplot_mstate_HRs(model = plot_df_inf_pathogen,
                      height = 45,clip=10,width = 32,
                      plot_save_name = "Figure_S12_mstate",
                      h_6 = gpar(col = "black", columns = 1:5, lty = "solid",lwd=2),
                      h_10 = gpar(col = "black", columns = 1:5, lty = "solid",lwd=2),
                      h_14 = gpar(col = "black", columns = 1:5, lty = "solid",lwd=2),
                      h_18 = gpar(col = "black", columns = 1:5, lty = "solid",lwd=2),
                      h_22 = gpar(col = "black", columns = 1:5, lty = "solid",lwd=2),
                      h_26 = gpar(col = "black", columns = 1:5, lty = "solid",lwd=2),
                      h_30 = gpar(col = "black", columns = 1:5, lty = "solid",lwd=2),
                      h_34 = gpar(col = "black", columns = 1:5, lty = "solid",lwd=2),
                      h_38 = gpar(col = "black", columns = 1:5, lty = "solid",lwd=2))
```

### EM infection type

```{r em_sepsis}
all_mstate_cox_sepsis  <- coxph(as.formula(paste("Surv(Tstart,Tstop,status)","~",
                                                  c(glue_collapse(c(expanded_covariates_infection_history,c("strata(trans)","cluster(setid)")),sep = "+")))),
                                 method = "breslow",
                                 data = filter(collect(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate_expcovs),inf_site_of_match_grp == "sepsis",
                                               if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing"))))
  
#
forestplot_mstate_HRs(model = all_mstate_cox_sepsis,
                                            events_exposed = events(filter(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate,inf_site_of_match_grp == "sepsis",exposed==1,
                                                                           if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),
                                                                                  ~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing")))),
                                            events_un_exposed = events(filter(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate,inf_site_of_match_grp == "sepsis",exposed==0,
                                                                           if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),
                                                                                  ~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing")))),
                                            plot_save_name = "forest_plot_sepsis")
```

```{r em_uti}
all_mstate_cox_uti  <- coxph(as.formula(paste("Surv(Tstart,Tstop,status)","~",
                                                  c(glue_collapse(c(expanded_covariates_infection_history,c("strata(trans)","cluster(setid)")),sep = "+")))),
                                 method = "breslow",
                                 data = filter(collect(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate_expcovs),inf_site_of_match_grp == "uti",
                                               if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing"))))

  
#
forestplot_mstate_HRs(model = all_mstate_cox_uti,
                                            events_exposed = events(filter(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate,inf_site_of_match_grp == "uti",exposed==1,
                                                                           if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),
                                                                                  ~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing")))),
                                            events_un_exposed = events(filter(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate,inf_site_of_match_grp == "uti",exposed==0,
                                                                           if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),
                                                                                  ~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing")))),
                                            plot_save_name = "forest_plot_uti")
```

```{r em_ssti}
all_mstate_cox_ssti  <- coxph(as.formula(paste("Surv(Tstart,Tstop,status)","~",
                                                  c(glue_collapse(c(expanded_covariates_infection_history,c("strata(trans)","cluster(setid)")),sep = "+")))),
                                 method = "breslow",
                                 data = filter(collect(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate_expcovs),inf_site_of_match_grp == "ssti",
                                               if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing"))))
  
#
forestplot_mstate_HRs(model = all_mstate_cox_ssto,
                                            events_exposed = events(filter(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate,inf_site_of_match_grp == "ssti",exposed==1,
                                                                           if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),
                                                                                  ~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing")))),
                                            events_un_exposed = events(filter(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate,inf_site_of_match_grp == "ssti",exposed==0,
                                                                           if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),
                                                                                  ~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing")))),
                                            plot_save_name = "forest_plot_ssti")
```

```{r em_lrti}
all_mstate_cox_lrti  <- coxph(as.formula(paste("Surv(Tstart,Tstop,status)","~",
                                                  c(glue_collapse(c(expanded_covariates_infection_history,c("strata(trans)","cluster(setid)")),sep = "+")))),
                                 method = "breslow",
                                 data = filter(collect(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate_expcovs),inf_site_of_match_grp == "lrti",
                                               if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing"))))
  
#
forestplot_mstate_HRs(model = all_mstate_cox_lrti,
                                            events_exposed = events(filter(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate,inf_site_of_match_grp == "lrti",exposed==1,
                                                                           if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),
                                                                                  ~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing")))),
                                            events_un_exposed = events(filter(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate,inf_site_of_match_grp == "lrti",exposed==0,
                                                                           if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),
                                                                                  ~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing")))),
                                            plot_save_name = "forest_plot_lrti")
```

```{r em_mening_enceph}
all_mstate_cox_mening_enceph  <- coxph(as.formula(paste("Surv(Tstart,Tstop,status)","~",
                                                  c(glue_collapse(c(expanded_covariates_infection_history,c("strata(trans)","cluster(setid)")),sep = "+")))),
                                 method = "breslow",
                                 data = filter(collect(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate_expcovs),inf_site_of_match_grp == "mening_enceph",
                                               if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing"))))
  
#
forestplot_mstate_HRs(model = all_mstate_cox_mening_enceph,
                                            events_exposed = events(filter(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate,inf_site_of_match_grp == "mening_enceph",exposed==1,
                                                                           if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),
                                                                                  ~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing")))),
                                            events_un_exposed = events(filter(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate,inf_site_of_match_grp == "mening_enceph",exposed==0,
                                                                           if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),
                                                                                  ~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing")))),
                                            plot_save_name = "forest_plot_mening_enceph")
```

# For gastro:
**Warning message:In grep(c("age", "harmful_alcohol_use"), expanded_covariates_infection_history) :argument 'pattern' has length > 1 and only the first element will be used**

# There is perfect success prediction for age_bl_cat43.6 (81-90) harmful_alcohol_use.6 in transition 6
# So to remove variables only for that transition

  
```{r em_gastro}
all_mstate_cox_gastro  <- coxph(as.formula(paste("Surv(Tstart,Tstop,status)","~",
                                                        c(glue_collapse(c(expanded_covariates_infection_history,c("strata(trans)","cluster(setid)")),sep = "+")))),
                                       method = "breslow",
                                       data = filter(collect(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate_expcovs),inf_site_of_match_grp == "gastro",
                                                     if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing"))))

#
forestplot_mstate_HRs(model = all_mstate_cox_gastro,
                      events_exposed = events(filter(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate,inf_site_of_match_grp == "gastro",exposed==1,
                                                     if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),
                                                            ~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing")))),
                      events_un_exposed = events(filter(inf_frailty_cprd_mstate,inf_site_of_match_grp == "gastro",exposed==0,
                                                        if_all(all_of(c(covariates)),
                                                               ~(!is.na(.x) & .x != "Missing")))),
                      plot_save_name = "forest_plot_gastro")

```
